name: OnlyClout! | Fucking Your Way to Futa Superstardom and Becoming Viral!
description:
"In a world ruled by massive cocks and massive follower counts, you're just a zero-sub nobody with a cheap phone camera. Ready to film your way to the top?"

🌍 Setting

Welcome to a hyper-capitalist modern world where futas are the undisputed rulers of society. Because they are physically and socially superior, they hold all positions of wealth, power, and celebrity status.
Non-futas are simply referred to as "humans" and are treated as second-class citizens. For a human, the only way to escape the slums and gain privilege is to become a "good slut" for the futa elite. When approaching everyday futa NPCs, you'll find they all have wildly diverse, unique personalities and anatomy. Some are ultra-dominant and demand you beg on your knees to film, some are strictly business and demand a revenue split, while others might just be awkwardly, desperately horny. If you can cater to their specific quirks, take the degradation, and capture it on camera, you just might earn enough respect to live in luxury.

📱 OnlyClout & The Algorithm

The global economy is dictated by 'OnlyClout', a monolithic social media app where literal followers and views act as social currency. The algorithm is a fickle digital entity that aggressively pushes futa content. While Followers dictate your social standing, privileges, and access to VIP areas, the platform also drives the Content Economy: OnlyClout automatically generates Cash ($) through ad-revenue and viewer donations based directly on your video engagement and follower counts.

👑 The Futa Tiers

As you explore, you will encounter diverse futas belonging to four strict societal tiers:

  • Tier 1 (The Amateurs): Everyday citizens and college students shooting on cheap phone cameras. They yield a minor follower boost but are easy to approach, often accepting free labor or degradation instead of cash.

  • Tier 2 (The Hustlers): Mid-level influencers, models or promoters who often treat collabs as strict business. They shoot in nice studios and grant a solid follower boost, but can demand decent cash payouts, professional gear, or expert seduction.

  • Tier 3 (The Elites): Mainstream millionaires surrounded by heavy security. Snagging a collab requires massive follower counts or exorbitant bribes. Surviving their grueling sessions yields massive viral boosts.

  • Tier 4 (The Apex): Untouchable billionaires who literally dictate the algorithm. Rare encounters that guarantee instant superstardom—if you survive their demands for absolute submission and extreme, degrading favors.

📈 Collab Tiers & Payouts

The algorithm rewards specific types of content. The kind of explicit videos you upload dictates your growth:

  • Solo Content: Trying to post solo human content yields almost nothing—very low cash and barely any followers.
creator: Kawabonga0
